tools.name: Field-Navigation Tool
tools.problem: Locating predetermined sampling-grid nodes in the field was slow and inconsistent.
tools.description: A lightweight, offline-friendly tool that guides the team directly to each grid node and confirms position before logging a reading — cutting orientation time and improving sampling consistency.

tools.name: This portfolio
tools.problem: Wanted a fast, self-managed site to present project work and writing.
tools.description: Designed and built this site end-to-end — a static, animated portfolio with a browser-based CMS, so content stays current without a developer.

timeline.title: B.S., Environmental Engineering
timeline.detail: Foundations in water resources, remediation, and environmental chemistry.

timeline.title: Passed FE · Earned EIT
timeline.detail: Engineer-in-Training designation; began the path toward PE licensure.

timeline.title: Environmental Engineer (EIT)
timeline.detail: Site characterization, remediation, and construction quality assurance across California.

timeline.title: Professional Engineer (PE)
timeline.detail: On track for licensure after the required experience.
